params.name: Narmer Palette
params.description:
On Dec 9, 3000 BC, after unifying Egypt, Narmer had someone record his achievement on the palette.
The Narmer Palette is a shield-shaped palette that records the reign of Pharaoh Narmer. On the front side, Narmer is wearing a white crown and holding a scepter while his enemy is fleeing. On the back, he is wearing a red crown on a battlefield full of enemy bodies. The white crown stands for Upper Egypt while the red one stands for Lower Egypt. His wearing both symbolizes the unification of Egy …
